summary: Made two surgical seam edits: tightened the opening callback to Chapter 15's spray-on-the-rails image and sharpened the closing soundscape so the handoff into Chapter 17's aftermath quiet lands more cleanly.
edits: Adjusted the opening sentence to echo the prior chapter's final rails image more directly.
